changelog.label: release
changelog.notes: Initial release. BGSI Auto Farm & Teleport live.

keySystemFaq.q: How long does the key last?
keySystemFaq.a: Keys are valid for 24 hours. After that, you'll need to complete the checkpoint again.

keySystemFaq.q: The checkpoint isn't working — what do I do?
keySystemFaq.a: Try disabling your ad blocker or switching browsers. If it still doesn't work, wait a few minutes and try again.

keySystemFaq.q: I completed the checkpoint but got no key.
keySystemFaq.a: Make sure you completed every task. If you were redirected but see no key, go back and try the checkpoint again.

keySystemFaq.q: Where do I paste the key?
keySystemFaq.a: Paste it into the Xan's Hub UI when prompted after running the loadstring script in Roblox.

faq.a: Any supported executor works — Delta, Solara, Synapse, etc.

faq.q: Why do I need a key?
faq.a: Keys help keep the hub free by supporting development. They only take about a minute to get.

faq.q: How do I use the script?
faq.a: Get your key, open your executor in Roblox, paste the loadstring, and execute.
Scripts are tested before every release, but always use an alt account to be safe.
Scripts are updated as soon as possible after game patches. Check the changelog for details.
